title: juncus coriaceus
intro: Juncus coriaceus, also known as the leathery rush, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Juncaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Juncus coriaceus include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Juncus coriaceus can be prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be dried and used in herbal teas, tinctures, or salves.
